series_metadata.series_title: Board of Elections Under Review by the Secretary of State’s Office
series_metadata.series_description: Documentation and correspondence related to county boards of elections undergoing review by the Secretary of State’s office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two (2) years following notification to board of elections that it is no longer subject to review, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain two (2) years following notification to board of elections that it is no longer subject to review, then may destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
